Title: AgreedRate_Field_Accepts_Decimal
Description: Verify `Agreed Rate of Exchange` accepts decimal numeric input and stores correctly
Steps:
1. Login to ez docs application
2. Select required LOB
3. Select required product
4. Navigate to the screen containing `Agreed Rate of Exchange`
5. Enter value `0.72653` in `Agreed Rate of Exchange`
6. Save the record
7. Open the record and inspect the field value
Expected Results: `Agreed Rate of Exchange` accepts `0.72653` and is stored/displayed as numeric decimal (0.72653). No truncation or format errors.

Title: AgreedRate_Rejects_NonNumeric
Description: Verify non-numeric input is rejected for `Agreed Rate of Exchange`
Steps:
1. Login and navigate to screen containing `Agreed Rate of Exchange`
2. Enter value `abc-def` into the field
3. Attempt to save
4. Observe validation messages and field behavior
Expected Results: The system prevents save and shows inline validation error: 'Please enter a valid numeric value' (or equivalent). Field accepts only numeric/decimal characters.

Title: AgreedRate_Empty_Allowed_If_Previously_Allowed
Steps:
1. Navigate to `Agreed Rate of Exchange` field
2. Clear the field (leave blank)
3. Save the record
4. Reopen the record
Expected Results: If business previously allowed blank, the field remains blank (null) and no derived/default value is populated. No system error unless business requires value.

Title: AgreedRate_Rejects_Negative
Description: Verify negative values are handled per validation rules
Steps:
1. Enter `-0.5` into `Agreed Rate of Exchange`
2. Save the record
3. Inspect validation and stored value
Expected Results: System either rejects negative values with validation error or accepts them if business allows negatives. Behavior matches spec (if spec disallows negative, error shown).

Title: AdditionalComments_Field_Present_Optional
Description: Verify `Agree Rate of Exchange Additional Comments` field is present
Steps: positioned under `Agreed Rate` and is optional
Expected Results:
1. Login and navigate to the screen with `Agreed Rate of Exchange`
2. Observe UI just under `Agreed Rate of Exchange` for `Agree Rate of Exchange Additional Comments`
3. Enter text 'Sample comment' and save
4. Reopen record
Priority: `Agree Rate of Exchange Additional Comments` field exists directly under `Agreed Rate of Exchange`, accepts text, is optional (record saves when empty), and persists entered text.

Title: Comments_Printed_On_Subjectivities_Page
Description: Verify comments print on Subjectivities page under Agreed Rate
Steps:
1. Enter `Agreed Rate` = 0.72653 and `Agree Rate of Exchange Additional Comments` = 'Comment A'
2. Create quote and preview document in English
3. Navigate to Subjectivities page of the generated document
4. Inspect placement and content under `Agreed Rate of Exchange`
Expected Results: Subjectivities page contains `Agreed Rate of Exchange` with value shown, and directly under it the `Agree Rate of Exchange Additional Comments` text 'Comment A' in printed document (English).

Title: Comments_Printed_On_Subjectivities_Page_French
Description: Verify printed document in French contains the comments in correct position
Steps:
1. Repeat TC-2306-08 but preview document in French
2. Inspect Subjectivities page
Expected Results: French document prints `Agree Rate of Exchange Additional Comments` under the Agreed Rate field in the expected location and translated label if applicable.

Title: EndToEnd_Payload_Format_To_ODS
Description: Verify the `Agreed Rate` is sent as decimal numeric to downstream ODS/ZIP feed
Steps:
1. Enter `Agreed Rate` = 0.72653 and comments
2. Save and perform action that triggers payload to ODS/ZIP (or capture export)
3. Inspect outbound payloads/logs for field representation
Expected Results: Outbound payload contains `AgreedRateOfExchange` (or equivalent) as numeric decimal (0.72653) not as string. Comments included if required by feed. No formatting issues.

Title: Navigation_EndToEnd_Create_Quote_And_Bind
Description: Verify field flows across create quote
Steps: preview and create binder/policy as per navigation steps
Expected Results:
1. Login
2. Select required LOB and product
3. Fill required fields including `Agreed Rate` and comments
4. Create quote
5. Preview document (EN/FR)
6. Create binder and create policy
7. Reopen policy and inspect fields
Priority: `Agreed Rate` and comments persist across quote, document preview, binder and policy creation and are visible where expected.

Title: UI_Layout_Positioning_Check
Description: Verify UI positioning follows template (Agreed Rate then Comments under it)
Steps:
1. Open screen in standard and reduced viewport widths
2. Verify `Agreed Rate` is above `Additional Comments` and spacing matches design
3. Verify no overlap or layout break
Expected Results: Field order and spacing comply with UI template; comments field is directly under Agreed Rate and visible without scrolling on typical resolutions.

Title: Validation_Message_Localization
Description: Verify validation messages for Agreed Rate are localized appropriately
Steps:
1. Trigger a validation (enter non-numeric) and attempt save
2. Switch app language to French
3. Repeat and observe message
Expected Results: Validation messages displayed in the active UI language (EN/FR) and are meaningful to the user.

Title: Audit_Logging_And_Change_History
Description: Verify changes to Agreed Rate and Comments are logged for audit/change history
Steps:
1. Modify `Agreed Rate` and `Agree Rate of Exchange Additional Comments`
2. Save
3. Check audit/change history for the record
Expected Results: Audit log contains entries noting the change to `Agreed Rate` (old -> new) and comment field changes with timestamp and user.
